description: Daily Vancouver WA Weather — Email + WhatsApp
prompt: Fetch the latest 5-day weather forecast for Vancouver, WA from the National Weather Service. Then: 1) Send the forecast via email to coolvishnu@gmail.com with subject '🌦️ Daily Vancouver, WA Weather Forecast' and the full formatted forecast in the body. 2) Also send the forecast summary to the user via WhatsApp. Include highs, lows, conditions, precipitation %, wind, and any active weather alerts.

description: Fantasy Baseball Heartbeat — Automated Lineup Optimizer
prompt: Check Yahoo Fantasy Baseball lineup for today. Optimize the starting lineup based on pitcher matchups, player status (injured/benched/day-off), and recent performance. Send lineup optimization recommendations email to BOTH coolvishnu@gmail.com AND jacob.sorensen@gmail.com separately using send_email. Email subject: ⚾ Fantasy Baseball Lineup Optimizer — [today's date]. Only run on days when MLB games are scheduled.

description: Fantasy Baseball Morning Brief — Daily 9 AM Email
prompt: Fetch the latest Yahoo Fantasy Baseball updates including roster news, injury reports, waiver wire recommendations, and matchup previews. Send a Fantasy Baseball Morning Brief email to BOTH coolvishnu@gmail.com AND jacob.sorensen@gmail.com separately using send_email. Email subject: ⚾ Fantasy Baseball Morning Brief — [today's date]. Only run on market working days (Mon-Fri, skip weekends and US holidays).

Fetch the latest S&P 500 and NASDAQ end-of-day market data including closing prices, daily change, top gainers, top losers, sector performance, trading volume, and market summary. Send a Daily S&P 500 & NASDAQ Market Snapshot email. You MUST call the send_email tool SEPARATELY for EACH of these 6 email addresses — do NOT try to combine them: 1) coolvishnu@gmail.com 2) cskums@gmail.com 3) singhsatish77@gmail.com 4) pratheepkr@gmail.com 5) sornakums@gmail.com 6) shawnholdings@gmail.com. After sending all 6 emails, ALSO send the same market snapshot content as a WhatsApp message using the send_whatsapp tool. This is an after-market-close summary so focus on final closing data, daily performance, and notable market events of the day. Only run on market working days (Monday-Friday, skip weekends and US market holidays).

Fetch the latest S&P 500 and NASDAQ pre-market data including futures, pre-market movers, key economic events scheduled for today, overnight global market performance, and any breaking news affecting markets. Send a Pre-Market Morning Brief email. You MUST call the send_email tool SEPARATELY for EACH of these 6 email addresses — do NOT try to combine them: 1) coolvishnu@gmail.com 2) cskums@gmail.com 3) singhsatish77@gmail.com 4) pratheepkr@gmail.com 5) sornakums@gmail.com 6) shawnholdings@gmail.com. After sending all 6 emails, ALSO send the same pre-market brief content as a WhatsApp message using the send_whatsapp tool. Only run on market working days (Monday-Friday, skip weekends and US market holidays).

Fetch the latest updates on the Iran-US war/conflict, including military developments, diplomatic actions, and market impact (oil prices, gold, stock indices, defense stocks). Write a concise summary and send it to the user via WhatsApp.
